# check-docs-updated

> This is a reference to the master script. Execute the script from `.skills/`.

## Location

```
.skills/doc-sync/scripts/check-docs-updated.js
```

## Usage

```bash
# From repository root:
node .skills/doc-sync/scripts/check-docs-updated.js
```

---

*This file references the executable script in the master `.skills/` directory.*
